Applies when<code>process.type in (REQUEST_EQUALS_CONDITION, REQUEST_NOT_EQUAL_CONDITION, REQUEST_IN_CONDITION, REQUEST_NOT_IN_CONDITION, CURRENT_LANG_IN_COND1, CURRENT_LANG_NOT_IN_COND1, CURRENT_LANG_NOT_EQ_COND1, CURRENT_LANG_EQ_COND1, DAD_NAME_EQ_CONDITION, DAD_NAME_NOT_EQ_CONDITION, SERVER_NAME_EQ_CONDITION, SERVER_NAME_NOT_EQ_CONDITION, HTTP_HOST_EQ_CONDITION, HTTP_HOST_NOT_EQ_CONDITION)</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>item</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=4000</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>process.type in (VAL_OF_ITEM_IN_COND_EQ_COND2, VAL_OF_ITEM_IN_COND_NOT_EQ_COND2, VALUE_OF_ITEM_IN_COND_1_EQ_COND_2, VALUE_OF_ITEM_IN_COND_1_NOT_EQ_COND_2, ITEM_IS_NULL, ITEM_IS_NOT_NULL, ITEM_IS_ZERO, ITEM_IS_NOT_ZERO, ITEM_IS_NULL_OR_ZERO, ITEM_NOT_NULL_OR_ZERO, ITEM_CONTAINS_NO_SPACES, ITEM_IS_NUMERIC, ITEM_IS_NOT_NUMERIC, ITEM_IS_ALPHANUMERIC, VALUE_OF_ITEM_IN_CONDITION_IN_COLON_DELIMITED_LIST, VALUE_OF_ITEM_IN_CONDITION_NOT_IN_COLON_DELIMITED_LIST)</code>
</div></td>
</tr>

<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=4000</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">

</div></td>
</tr>

<td><code>page</code></td>

<td></td>

</div></td>

</div></td>

<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">

</div></td>
</tr>

<td><code>item</code></td>

<td></td>
<td>maxLen=4000</td>
</tr>

</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>executeCondition</code></td>
<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>

</tr>
<tr class="source-row">

</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Copy

```` typescript
serverSideCondition {
  whenButtonPressed: @component
  executionScope: forCreatedAndModifiedRows
  type: always
  sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
  language: sql
  sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
  plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
  javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  value: value
  item: value
  preference: value
  page: 42
  pages: [1, 2]
  text: text
  list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  executeCondition: forEachRow
}
````

security

| Property              | Type     | Required | Default Value | Details |
|-----------------------|----------|----------|---------------|---------|
| `authorizationScheme` | `string` | No       |               |         |

Copy

``` typescript
security {
  authorizationScheme: @component
}
```

config

| Property      | Type     | Required | Default Value | Details |
|---------------|----------|----------|---------------|---------|
| `buildOption` | `string` | No       |               |         |

Copy

``` typescript
config {
  buildOption: @component
}
```

comments

| Property   | Type               | Required | Default Value | Details     |
|------------|--------------------|----------|---------------|-------------|
| `comments` | `multiline string` | No       |               | maxLen=4000 |

Copy

```` typescript
comments {
  comments: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
}
````

#### APEXlang Example

Copy

```` typescript
process "example" (
  name: exampleName
  type: staticContent
  executionChain: value
  formRegion: @component
  editableRegion: @component
  genAI {
    enabled: false
    agent: @component
    service: @component
    systemPrompt: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
  }
  source {
    location: localDatabase
    language: plsql
    plsqlCode: ```
    apex_debug.message('Processing APEXlang component');
    apex_collection.create_or_truncate_collection(
        p_collection_name => 'EXAMPLE_ROWS'
    );
    ```
    javaScriptCode: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
    remoteServer: @component
  }
  execution {
    sequence: 42
    point: value
    runProcess: oncePerSessionOrWhenReset
  }
  successMessage {
    successMessage: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
  }
  error {
    errorMessage: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
    displayLocation: inlineInNotification
  }
  advanced {
    staticId: value
    executionMappingIdentifier: value
  }
  serverSideCondition {
    whenButtonPressed: @component
    executionScope: forCreatedAndModifiedRows
    type: always
    sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
    language: sql
    sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
    plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
    plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    value: value
    item: value
    preference: value
    page: 42
    pages: [1, 2]
    text: text
    list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
    executeCondition: forEachRow
  }
  security {
    authorizationScheme: @component
  }
  config {
    buildOption: @component
  }
  comments {
    comments: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
  }
)
````

Copy

```` typescript
value {
  type: staticValue
  staticValue: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
  sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
  item: value
  language: sql
  sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
  plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
  javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  formatMask: value
  trueValue: value
  falseValue: value
}
````

Copy

```` typescript
link {
  linkColumn: singleRowView
  uniquelyIdentifyRowsBy: rowid
  uniqueColumn: value
  target: value
  linkIcon: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
  linkAttributes: value
  authorizationScheme: @component
  conditionType: always
  sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
  language: sql
  sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
  plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
  javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  value: value
  item: value
  preference: value
  page: 42
  pages: [1, 2]
  text: text
  list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
}
````

<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>

</tr>

</div></td>

<td></td>

</div></td>

<td>No</td>
<td></td>

<tr class="source-row">

<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=255</td>

edit

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Property</th>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Required</th>
<th>Default Value</th>
<th>Details</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>addRowIfEmpty</code></td>
<td><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>true</code></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = interactiveGrid</code><code>edit.allowedOperations = i</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>enabled</code></td>
<td><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>false</code></td>
<td><div class="help-text">
<p>Specify whether end users can edit this Form region.</p>
<p>Note - When the Form region is made editable a process is automatically created to process the row.</p>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type NOT_IN_LIST classicReport, tabularForm, interactiveReport, interactiveGrid, chart, cards, map</code><code>region.type supports EDITABLE</code>
Applies when<code>region.type = interactiveGrid</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>allowedOperations</code></td>
<td><code>array of enums</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>enum=[<code>add</code>, <code>update</code>, <code>delete</code>]
<p>Check which data manipulation language (DML) operations are supported. This process will perform DML operations based on the <strong>Database Action</strong> attribute of the button to submit the page. If that attribute is not set, the operation will be determined by the button Request value, which is set based on the Button Name, as follows:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Add Row</strong> is triggered by Request Values: INSERT, CREATE, CREATE_AGAIN, CREATEAGAIN</li>
<li><strong>Update Row</strong> is triggered by Request Values: SAVE, APPLY CHANGES, UPDATE, UPDATE ROW, CHANGE, APPLY, APPLY%CHANGES%, GET_NEXT%, GET_PREV%</li>
<li><strong>Delete Row</strong> is triggered by Request Values: DELETE, REMOVE, DELETE ROW, DROP</li>
</ul>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type NOT_IN_LIST classicReport, tabularForm, interactiveReport, interactiveGrid, chart, cards, map</code><code>edit.enabled = Y</code>
Applies when<code>region.type = interactiveGrid</code><code>edit.enabled = Y</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>allowedRowOperationsColumn</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=32767</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type NOT_IN_LIST classicReport, tabularForm, interactiveReport, interactiveGrid, chart, cards, map</code><code>edit.allowedOperations in (u, d)</code>
Applies when<code>region.type = interactiveGrid</code><code>edit.allowedOperations in (u, d)</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>lostUpdateType</code></td>
<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>rowValues</code></td>
<td>enum=[<code>rowValues</code>, <code>rowVersionColumn</code>]</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type NOT_IN_LIST classicReport, tabularForm, interactiveReport, interactiveGrid, chart, cards, map</code><code>edit.enabled = Y</code>
Applies when<code>region.type = interactiveGrid</code><code>edit.enabled = Y</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>rowVersionColumn</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=32767</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type NOT_IN_LIST classicReport, tabularForm, interactiveReport, interactiveGrid, chart, cards, map</code><code>edit.lostUpdateType = COLUMN</code>
Applies when<code>region.type = interactiveGrid</code><code>edit.lostUpdateType = COLUMN</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

  addRowIfEmpty: false
  enabled: false
  allowedOperations: [
        add
        update
    ]
  allowedRowOperationsColumn: value
  lostUpdateType: rowValues
  rowVersionColumn: value
}
```

<tr class="source-row">

Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>dataCursor.cursor in (auto, on) and chart.type NOT_IN_LIST polar, dial, gantt</code>

settings

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Property</th>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Required</th>
<th>Default Value</th>
<th>Details</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>timeAxisType</code></td>
<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>enum=[<code>auto</code>, <code>disabled</code>, <code>enabled</code>, <code>mixedFrequency</code>, <code>skipGaps</code>]</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>chart.type in (area, bar, line, lineWithArea, stock, boxPlot, combo)</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>zoomAndScroll</code></td>
<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>false</code></td>
<td>enum=[<code>false</code>, <code>delayed</code>, <code>delayedScrollOnly</code>, <code>live</code>, <code>liveScrollOnly</code>]
<p>Specify the zoom and scroll behavior of the chart. <strong>Live</strong> behavior means that the chart will be updated continuously as it is being manipulated, while <strong>Delayed</strong> means that the update will wait until the zoom/scroll action is done. While <strong>Live</strong> zoom and scroll provides the best end user experience, no guarantees are made about the rendering performance or usability for large data sets or slow client environments. If performance is an issue, <strong>Delayed</strong> zoom and scroll should be used instead.</p>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>chart.type NOT_IN_LIST dial, pie, donut, gantt</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>zoomDirection</code></td>
<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>bothAxes</code></td>
<td>enum=[<code>bothAxes</code>, <code>xAxis</code>, <code>yAxis</code>]</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>chart.type in (bubble, scatter) and settings.zoomAndScroll NOT_EQUALS off</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>initialZooming</code></td>
<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>none</code></td>
<td>enum=[<code>first</code>, <code>last</code>, <code>none</code>]</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>chart.type in (bar, line, area, lineWithArea, combo, stock) and settings.zoomAndScroll NOT_EQUALS off</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>showHorizontalGrid</code></td>
<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>auto</code></td>
<td>enum=[<code>auto</code>, <code>true</code>, <code>false</code>]</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>chart.type = gantt</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>showVerticalGrid</code></td>
<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>auto</code></td>
<td>enum=[<code>auto</code>, <code>true</code>, <code>false</code>]</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>chart.type = gantt</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>showRowAxis</code></td>
<td><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>on</code></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>chart.type = gantt</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>axisPosition</code></td>
<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>top</code></td>
<td>enum=[<code>top</code>, <code>bottom</code>]</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>chart.type = gantt</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>

</tr>
<tr class="source-row">

Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>chart.type in (pie, donut)</code>
</div></td>
</tr>

<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>

</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Copy

``` typescript
settings {
  timeAxisType: auto
  zoomAndScroll: false
  zoomDirection: bothAxes
  initialZooming: first
  showHorizontalGrid: auto
  showVerticalGrid: auto
  showRowAxis: false
  axisPosition: top
  pieSelectionEffect: explode
  renderAs: area
}
```

Applies when<code>region.type = cards</code><code>iconAndBadge.badgeColumn is set</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>badgeCssClasses</code></td>
<td><code>array of strings</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=255</td>

<tr class="source-row">

</div></td>
</tr>

``` typescript
iconAndBadge {
  iconSource: initials
  iconColumn: fa-check

  badgeColumn: value

        value1

    ]
}

messages

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Property</th>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Required</th>
<th>Default Value</th>
<th>Details</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>whenMoreDataFound</code></td>
<td><code>multiline string</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=4000
Enter the message to display when the number of rows returned by the query exceeds the <strong>Maximum Rows to Process</strong> value, or when the number of rows remaining after report settings are applied exceeds the <strong>Maximum Rows to Display</strong> value.<br />
Please note this message can only be shown in case of the Maximum Rows to Display if the pagination size is set to All.
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = interactiveReport</code>
Applies when<code>region.type = classicReport</code>
Applies when<code>region.type = tabularForm</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>whenNoDataFound</code></td>
<td><code>multiline string</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=4000</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type NOT_IN_LIST classicReport, tabularForm, interactiveReport, interactiveGrid, chart, cards, map</code><code>region.type supports NO_DATA_FOUND_MESSAGE and componentAppearance.display = REPORT or not set</code>
Applies when<code>region.type = interactiveReport</code>
Applies when<code>region.type = classicReport</code>
Applies when<code>region.type = tabularForm</code>
Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code>
Applies when<code>region.type = interactiveGrid</code>
Applies when<code>region.type = cards</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>noDataFoundIcon</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=4000</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type NOT_IN_LIST classicReport, tabularForm, interactiveReport, interactiveGrid, chart, cards, map</code><code>region.type supports NO_DATA_FOUND_ICON and messages.whenNoDataFound is set</code>
Applies when<code>region.type = cards</code><code>messages.whenNoDataFound is set</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<table>

Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>chart.type in (pie, donut)</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>min</code></td>
<td><code>integer</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=32767</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>chart.type in (pie, donut)</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>show</code></td>
<td><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>true</code></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>chart.type = dial</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>valueType</code></td>
<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>number</code></td>
<td>enum=[<code>number</code>, <code>percent</code>]</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>chart.type = dial</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>position</code></td>
<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>auto</code></td>
<td>enum=[<code>auto</code>, <code>center</code>, <code>insideIndicatorEdge</code>, <code>outsideIndicatorEdge</code>, <code>outsidePlotArea</code>, <code>withLabel</code>]</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>chart.type = dial and gauge.orientation NOT_EQUALS circular</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>format</code></td>
<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>enum=[<code>dateShort</code>, <code>dateMedium</code>, <code>dateLong</code>, <code>dateFull</code>, <code>timeShort</code>, <code>timeMedium</code>, <code>timeLong</code>, <code>timeFull</code>, <code>datetimeShort</code>, <code>datetimeMedium</code>, <code>datetimeLong</code>, <code>datetimeFull</code>, <code>decimal</code>, <code>currency</code>, <code>percent</code>]
<p>Specify the type of formatting to be applied to the value on the chart. The formats <strong>Decimal</strong>,<strong>Percent</strong> or <strong>Currency</strong> only apply to numeric values. The <strong>Date</strong>,<strong>Time</strong> and <strong>DateTime</strong> formats will only apply to values of that data type on the chart.</p>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>chart.type in (dial, funnel, pyramid, pie, donut)</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>decimalPlaces</code></td>
<td><code>integer</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=32767; min=0
Specify the number of decimal places to be applied to the numeric value on the chart.
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>chart.type in (dial, funnel, pyramid, pie, donut) and value.format in (decimal, currency, percent)</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>currency</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=128</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>chart.type in (dial, funnel, pyramid, pie, donut) and value.format = currency</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>pattern</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=30
Specify the numeric pattern to be applied to the numeric value on the chart.
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>chart.type in (dial, funnel, pyramid, pie, donut) and value.format in (decimal, currency, percent)</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>formatScaling</code></td>
<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>auto</code></td>
<td>enum=[<code>none</code>, <code>auto</code>, <code>thousand</code>, <code>million</code>, <code>billion</code>, <code>trillion</code>, <code>quadrillion</code>]</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = chart</code><code>chart.type in (dial, funnel, pyramid, pie, donut)</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

``` typescript
value {
  pieChartOtherThreshold: 42
  min: 1
  show: false
  valueType: number
  position: auto
  format: dateShort
  decimalPlaces: 42
  currency: value
  pattern: value
  formatScaling: none
}

<table>

</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type supports ORDER_BY and region.location in (LOCAL, REMOTE, SAMPLE_DATA) and region.type in (TABLE, GRAPH, SQL, FUNC_BODY_RETURNING_SQL, $NULL$) or not set</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>orderByClause</code></td>
<td><code>multiline string</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td></td>

</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = STATIC and region.type in (TABLE, SQL, FUNC_BODY_RETURNING_SQL, $NULL$) or not set</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>item</code></td>
<td><code>complex</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=32767</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = ITEM and region.type in (TABLE, SQL, FUNC_BODY_RETURNING_SQL, $NULL$) or not set</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>orderByClause</code></td>
<td><code>multiline string</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td></td>
<td>language=<code>sql</code>; maxLen=4000</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = STATIC and region.type = GRAPH</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>item</code></td>
<td><code>complex</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=32767</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = ITEM and region.type = GRAPH</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

}

```` typescript

    status = 'ACTIVE'
    ```
  sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
  language: plsql
  plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  orderByType: staticValue
  orderByClause: ```
    created_on desc
    ```
  item: value
  orderByItem: value
}
````

<td></td>

advanced

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Property</th>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Required</th>
<th>Default Value</th>
<th>Details</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>savedReportMappingIdentifier</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=32767</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type = interactiveReport</code>
Applies when<code>region.type = interactiveGrid</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>htmlDomId</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=255; regex=<code>/^[^:/,+?^'" ]+$/</code>
<p>Enter the DOM ID for this region. If defined, this is used as the ID for the region, using the substitution string <code>#DOM_ID#</code>, which can be useful if developing custom JavaScript behavior for the region. If this is not defined, the region generates an internal ID.</p>
<p>Note: The template must include the <code>#DOM_ID#</code> substitution string, in order for the region to utilize the DOM ID entered.</p>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>customAttributes</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=2000
Enter the value substituted into region attributes. Region templates that contain the substitution string <code>#REGION_ATTRIBUTES#</code> are substituted with this value.
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type supports REGION_TEMPLATE</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>regionImage</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=255</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.template supports NOT_REGION_IMAGE_URL</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>imageTagAttributes</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=255</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.regionImage is set</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>staticId</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=255</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>regionDisplaySelector</code></td>
<td><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>false</code></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.template is set or not set</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>excludeTitleFromTranslation</code></td>
<td><code>boolean</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>false</code></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>schemaOverrideItem</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=4000</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type in (classicReport, interactiveReport)</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Copy

``` typescript
advanced {
  savedReportMappingIdentifier: value
  htmlDomId: value
  customAttributes: value
  regionImage: value
  imageTagAttributes: value
  staticId: value
  regionDisplaySelector: false
  excludeTitleFromTranslation: false
  schemaOverrideItem: unique-id
}

headerAndFooter

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Property</th>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Required</th>
<th>Default Value</th>
<th>Details</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>headerText</code></td>
<td><code>multiline string</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>language=<code>html</code>; maxLen=4000
Enter HTML text displayed at the top of the region, before the <code>#BODY#</code> content.
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type supports REGION_TEMPLATE</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>footerText</code></td>
<td><code>multiline string</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>language=<code>html</code>; maxLen=4000
<p>Enter a region footer that displays directly after the body content, after <code>#BODY#</code> in the region template. You may use shortcuts, as well as the substitution string <code>#TIMING#</code>, to display the time consumed to render the region.</p>
<p>For report regions you can use the following pagination substitution strings:</p>
<dl>
<dt><code>#ROWS_FETCHED#</code></dt>
<dd>
Shows the number of rows fetched by the reporting engine (the page size). Use these substitution strings to display customized messages to the user.
</dd>
<dt><code>#TOTAL_ROWS#</code></dt>
<dd>
Displays the total number of rows that satisfy a SQL query used for a report. For example, Z in rows X - Y of Z
</dd>
<dt><code>#FIRST_ROW_FETCHED#</code></dt>
<dd>
The X in rows X - Y of Z
</dd>
<dt><code>#LAST_ROW_FETCHED#</code></dt>
<dd>
The Y in rows X - Y of Z
</dd>
</dl>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>region.type supports REGION_TEMPLATE</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Copy

headerAndFooter {
  headerText: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
  footerText: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
}
````

<table>

<td></td>

<code>text=value</code>, <code>text!=value</code>, <code>textIsContainedInValue</code>, <code>textIsNotContainedInValue</code>, <code>userPreference=value</code>, <code>userPreference!=value</code>, <code>cgiEnvServerName!=value</code>, <code>cgiEnvHttpHost=value</code>, <code>cgiEnvHttpHost!=value</code>, <code>never</code>]</td>

</div></td>

</div></td>

</div></td>

### `action`

**Parent:** [`region`](#comp-5110)

Applies when`region.type = cards`

**Children:** [`triggerAction`](#comp-8750)

**Direct Properties:**

</div></td>

</table>

Copy

```` typescript
serverSideCondition {
  type: always
  sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
  language: sql
  sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
  plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
  javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  value: value
  item: value
  preference: value
  page: 42
  pages: [1, 2]
  text: text
  list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  executeCondition: forEachRow
}
````

  authorizationScheme: @component
}

    ```
}
````

#### APEXlang Example

Copy

```` typescript
action "example" (
  type: button
  label: label
  layout {
    position: primary
    sequence: 42
  }
  behavior {
    type: redirectThisApp
    target: value
    targetUrl: value
    linkAttributes: value
  }
  appearance {
    displayType: text
    icon: fa-check
    hot: false
    cssClasses: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  }
  advanced {
    staticId: value
  }
  serverSideCondition {
    type: always
    sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
    language: sql
    sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
    plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
    plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    value: value
    item: value
    preference: value
    page: 42
    pages: [1, 2]
    text: text
    list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
    executeCondition: forEachRow
  }
  security {
    authorizationScheme: @component
  }
  config {
    buildOption: @component
  }
  comments {
    comments: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
  }
)
````

Copy

```` typescript
serverSideCondition {
  type: always
  sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
  language: sql
  sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
  plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
  javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  value: value
  item: value
  preference: value
  page: 42
  pages: [1, 2]
  text: text
  list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
}
````

security {
  authorizationScheme: @component
}

advanced {

    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );

| Property   | Type               | Required | Default Value | Details     |

```` typescript
comments {
  comments: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
}
````

#### APEXlang Example

Copy

```` typescript
triggerAction "example" (
  name: exampleName
  action: staticContent
  genAI {
    enabled: false
    agent: @component
    service: @component
    systemPrompt: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
    welcomeMessage: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
    itemsToSubmit: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  }
  affectedElements {
    selectionType: value
    region: @component
    button: @component
    items: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
    jquerySelector: "select * from table_name"
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  }
  execution {
    sequence: 42
    stopExecutionOnError: false
    waitForResult: false
  }
  clientSideCondition {
    type: "item=value"
    item: value
    value: value
    list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  }
  serverSideCondition {
    type: always
    sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
    language: sql
    sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
    plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
    plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    value: value
    item: value
    preference: value
    page: 42
    pages: [1, 2]
    text: text
    list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  }
  security {
    authorizationScheme: @component
  }
  config {
    buildOption: @component
  }
  advanced {
    staticId: value
    initJavaScriptFunction: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  }
  comments {
    comments: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
  }
)
````

### `action`

**Parent:** [`region`](#comp-5110)

Applies when`region.type starts with TMPL_`

**Children:** [`menu`](#comp-8710), [`triggerAction`](#comp-8730)

**Direct Properties:**

<colgroup>

<td></td>
<td></td>
</tr>

<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td></td>
<td></td>
</tr>

Copy

```` typescript
serverSideCondition {
  type: always
  sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
  language: sql
  sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
  plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
  javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  value: value
  item: value
  preference: value
  page: 42
  pages: [1, 2]
  text: text
  list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  executeCondition: forEachRow
}
````

security

| Property              | Type     | Required | Default Value | Details |
|-----------------------|----------|----------|---------------|---------|
| `authorizationScheme` | `string` | No       |               |         |

Copy

``` typescript
security {
  authorizationScheme: @component
}
```

config

| Property      | Type     | Required | Default Value | Details |
|---------------|----------|----------|---------------|---------|
| `buildOption` | `string` | No       |               |         |

Copy

``` typescript
config {
  buildOption: @component
}
```

comments

| Property   | Type               | Required | Default Value | Details     |
|------------|--------------------|----------|---------------|-------------|
| `comments` | `multiline string` | No       |               | maxLen=4000 |

Copy

```` typescript
comments {
  comments: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
}
````

#### APEXlang Example

Copy

```` typescript
action "example" (
  position: value
  template: value
  label: label
  layout {
    sequence: 42
  }
  behavior {
    type: redirectThisApp
    target: value
    targetUrl: value
    linkAttributes: value
  }
  appearance {
    displayType: text
    icon: fa-check
    hot: false
    showAsDisabled: false
    cssClasses: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  }
  advanced {
    staticId: value
  }
  serverSideCondition {
    type: always
    sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
    language: sql
    sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
    plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
    plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    value: value
    item: value
    preference: value
    page: 42
    pages: [1, 2]
    text: text
    list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
    executeCondition: forEachRow
  }
  security {
    authorizationScheme: @component
  }
  config {
    buildOption: @component
  }
  comments {
    comments: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
  }
)
````

### `menu`

**Parent:** [`action`](#comp-8610)

Applies when`action.position supports MENU or action.template supports MENU`

**Children:** [`triggerAction`](#comp-8725)

Copy

```` typescript
serverSideCondition {
  type: always
  sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
  language: sql
  sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
  plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
  javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  value: value
  item: value
  preference: value
  page: 42
  pages: [1, 2]
  text: text
  list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  executeCondition: forEachRow
}
````

#### APEXlang Example

Copy

```` typescript
menu "example" (
  type: menuEntry
  label: label
  parentMenu: @component
  layout {
    sequence: 42
  }
  behavior {
    type: redirectThisApp
    target: value
    targetUrl: value
    linkAttributes: value
  }
  appearance {
    icon: fa-check
  }
  serverSideCondition {
    type: always
    sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
    language: sql
    sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
    plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
    plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    value: value
    item: value
    preference: value
    page: 42
    pages: [1, 2]
    text: text
    list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
    executeCondition: forEachRow
  }
  advanced {
    staticId: value
  }
  security {
    authorizationScheme: @component
  }
  config {
    buildOption: @component
  }
  comments {
    comments: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
  }
)
````

<code>currentPage=page</code>, <code>currentPage!=page</code>, <code>currentPageInList</code>, <code>currentPageNotInList</code>, <code>currentPage=pageSubmitted</code>, <code>currentPage!=pageSubmitted</code>, <code>currentPageIsInPrinterFriendlyMode</code>, <code>currentPageIsNotInPrinterFriendlyMode</code>, <code>pageRegionIsReadOnly</code>, <code>pageRegionIsNotReadOnly</code>, <code>userIsAuthenticated</code>, <code>userIsPublicUser</code>, <code>inlineValidationErrorsDisplayed</code>, <code>inlineValidationErrorsNotDisplayed</code>, <code>sqlReportsOkToShowForwardButton</code>, <code>sqlReportsOkToShowBackButton</code>, <code>currentLanguage=value</code>, <code>currentLanguage!=value</code>, <code>currentLanguageIsContainedInValue</code>, <code>currentLanguageIsNotContainedInValue</code>, <code>clientBrowserIsMozilla</code>, <code>clientBrowserIsIE7higher</code>, <code>clientBrowserIsXhtmlCssCapable</code>, <code>clientBrowserIsOther</code>, <code>cgiEnvDadName=value</code>, <code>cgiEnvDadName!=value</code>, <code>cgiEnvServerName=value</code>, <code>cgiEnvServerName!=value</code>, <code>cgiEnvHttpHost=value</code>, <code>cgiEnvHttpHost!=value</code>, <code>never</code>]
Select a condition type to be met in order for this action to be active.
</div></td>
</tr>

Copy

```` typescript
serverSideCondition {
  type: always
  sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
  language: sql
  sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
  plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
  javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  value: value
  item: value
  preference: value
  page: 42
  pages: [1, 2]
  text: text
  list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
}
````

#### APEXlang Example

Copy

```` typescript
triggerAction "example" (
  name: exampleName
  action: staticContent
  genAI {
    enabled: false
    agent: @component
    service: @component
    systemPrompt: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
    welcomeMessage: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
    itemsToSubmit: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  }
  affectedElements {
    selectionType: value
    region: @component
    button: @component
    items: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
    jquerySelector: "select * from table_name"
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  }
  execution {
    sequence: 42
    stopExecutionOnError: false
    waitForResult: false
  }
  clientSideCondition {
    type: "item=value"
    item: value
    value: value
    list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  }
  serverSideCondition {
    type: always
    sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
    language: sql
    sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
    plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
    plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    value: value
    item: value
    preference: value
    page: 42
    pages: [1, 2]
    text: text
    list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  }
  security {
    authorizationScheme: @component
  }
  config {
    buildOption: @component
  }
  advanced {
    staticId: value
    initJavaScriptFunction: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  }
  comments {
    comments: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
  }
)
````

  stopExecutionOnError: false
  waitForResult: false
}

Copy

```` typescript
serverSideCondition {
  type: always
  sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
  language: sql
  sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
  plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
  javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  value: value
  item: value
  preference: value
  page: 42
  pages: [1, 2]
  text: text
  list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
}
````

#### APEXlang Example

Copy

```` typescript
triggerAction "example" (
  name: exampleName
  action: staticContent
  genAI {
    enabled: false
    agent: @component
    service: @component
    systemPrompt: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
    welcomeMessage: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
    itemsToSubmit: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  }
  affectedElements {
    selectionType: value
    region: @component
    button: @component
    items: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
    jquerySelector: "select * from table_name"
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  }
  execution {
    sequence: 42
    stopExecutionOnError: false
    waitForResult: false
  }
  clientSideCondition {
    type: "item=value"
    item: value
    value: value
    list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  }
  serverSideCondition {
    type: always
    sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
    language: sql
    sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
    plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
    plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    value: value
    item: value
    preference: value
    page: 42
    pages: [1, 2]
    text: text
    list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  }
  security {
    authorizationScheme: @component
  }
  config {
    buildOption: @component
  }
  advanced {
    staticId: value
    initJavaScriptFunction: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  }
  comments {
    comments: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
  }
)
````

### `axis`

#### APEXlang Example

Copy

``` typescript
axis "example" (
  name: exampleName
  showAxis: false
  title: "Page title"
  timeScale {
    scale: seconds
  }
  zoomScale {
    seconds: false
    minutes: false
    hours: false
    days: false
    weeks: false
    months: false
    quarters: false
    years: false
  }
  title {
    fontFamily: arial
    fontStyle: normal
    fontSize: "8"
    fontColor: value
  }
  value {
    min: 1
    max: 5
    format: dateShort
    decimalPlaces: 42
    currency: value
    pattern: value
    formatScaling: none
    baselineScaling: min
    scale: linear
    step: 42
  }
  appearance {
    position: auto
  }
  majorTicks {
    show: auto
    minStep: 1
  }
  minorTicks {
    show: auto
    step: 42
  }
  tickLabel {
    show: false
    rotation: false
    position: outside
    fontFamily: arial
    fontStyle: normal
    fontSize: "8"
    fontColor: value
  }
  dualYAxes {
    show: auto
    splitterPosition: 42
  }
  advanced {
    staticId: value
  }
)
```

### `column`

**Parent:** [`region`](#comp-5110)

Applies when`region.type = interactiveReport`

**Children:** [`action`](#comp-8615)

**Direct Properties:**

| Property | Type | Required | Default Value | Details |
|----|----|----|----|----|
| `columnName` | `string` | Yes |  | maxLen=128 |
| `type` | `enum` | Yes |  | enum=\[`appTemplateComponent/<templateComponentName>`, `displayImage`, `downloadBlob`, `hidden`, `link`, `percentGraph`, `plainText`, `plainTextBasedOnLov`, `plugin/<pluginName>`, `removeHtml`, `richText`, `rowSelector`, `themeTemplateComponent/actions`, `themeTemplateComponent/avatar`, `themeTemplateComponent/avatarTemplateComponent`, `themeTemplateComponent/badge`, `themeTemplateComponent/badgeTemplateComponent`, `themeTemplateComponent/comments`, `themeTemplateComponent/contentRow`, `themeTemplateComponent/contextualInfoTemplateComponent`, `themeTemplateComponent/emptyStateTemplateComponent`, `themeTemplateComponent/listItemTemplateComponent`, `themeTemplateComponent/mediaList`, `themeTemplateComponent/metricCard`, `themeTemplateComponent/timeline`\] |

- rowSelection
- heading

- accessibility

- appearance

<th>Required</th>
<th>Default Value</th>
<th>Details</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>heading</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=4000</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>column.type NOT_EQUALS rowSelector</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>alternativeLabel</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=4000
Enter the alternative label to use in dialogs and in various column heading placements. Use an alternative label when the heading contains extra formatting, such as HTML tags, which do not display properly.
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>column.type NOT_EQUALS rowSelector</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>alignment</code></td>
<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>start</code></td>
<td>enum=[<code>start</code>, <code>center</code>, <code>end</code>]</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>column.type NOT_IN_LIST hiddenColumn, rowSelector</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 20%" />

<td>Yes</td>

<td>enum=[<code>none</code>, <code>defaultBasedOnColumnType</code>, <code>definedLovExactMatch</code>, <code>definedLovWordContains</code>, <code>namedLovExactMatch</code>, <code>namedLovWordContains</code>]</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>column.type NOT_STARTS_WITH_ANY hiddenColumn, plainLov, richText, rowSelector, TMPL_</code>

<td><code>namedLov</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>column.type in (1, 2)</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>sqlQuery</code></td>
<td><code>multiline string</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td></td>
<td>language=<code>sql</code>; maxLen=4000</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>column.type in (S, C)</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>dateRanges</code></td>
<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>all</code></td>
<td>enum=[<code>all</code>, <code>past</code>, <code>future</code>]</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>column.dataType = DATE and column.type = D</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>type</code></td>
<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>namedLovExactMatch</code></td>
<td>enum=[<code>none</code>, <code>defaultBasedOnColumnType</code>, <code>definedLovExactMatch</code>, <code>definedLovWordContains</code>, <code>namedLovExactMatch</code>, <code>namedLovWordContains</code>]</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>column.type = plainLov</code>
</div></td>
</tr>

<td><code>sqlQuery</code></td>

<td></td>

</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Copy

```` typescript
columnFilter {
  type: none
  namedLov: @component
  sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
  dateRanges: all
}
````

<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Property</th>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Required</th>
<th>Default Value</th>
<th>Details</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>htmlDomId</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=255; regex=<code>/^[^:/,+?^'" ]+$/</code>
Enter the DOM ID for the column. If defined, the DOM ID is used as the ID for the corresponding table header (TH) cell, and as the HEADERS value for corresponding table data (TD) cells. The DOM ID can be useful when developing custom JavaScript behavior, or custom style for the column. If the DOM ID is not defined, the table generates an internal ID for these attribute values.
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>column.type NOT_EQUALS rowSelector</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>endUserAlias</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=10; regex=<code>/^[ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ]{1,2}$/</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Copy

``` typescript
advanced {
  htmlDomId: value
  endUserAlias: value
}
```

Copy

```` typescript
serverSideCondition {
  type: always
  sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
  language: sql
  sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
  plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
  javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  value: value
  item: value
  preference: value
  page: 42
  pages: [1, 2]
  text: text
  list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
}
````

#### APEXlang Example

Copy

```` typescript
column "example" (
  columnName: value
  type: staticContent
  rowSelection {
    enableMultiSelect: false
    showSelectAll: false
    hideControl: false
    currentSelectionPageItem: value
  }
  heading {
    heading: value
    alternativeLabel: value
    alignment: start
  }
  singleRowView {
    useColumnHeading: false
    label: label
  }

### `action`

**Parent:** [`column`](#comp-7030)

Applies when`column.type starts with TMPL_`

**Children:** [`menu`](#comp-8715), [`triggerAction`](#comp-8770)

**Direct Properties:**

Copy

```` typescript
serverSideCondition {
  type: always
  sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
  language: sql
  sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
  plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
  javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  value: value
  item: value
  preference: value
  page: 42
  pages: [1, 2]
  text: text
  list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  executeCondition: forEachRow
}
````

| Property              | Type     | Required | Default Value | Details |
|-----------------------|----------|----------|---------------|---------|
| `authorizationScheme` | `string` | No       |               |         |

Copy

``` typescript
security {
  authorizationScheme: @component
}
```

config

| Property      | Type     | Required | Default Value | Details |
|---------------|----------|----------|---------------|---------|
| `buildOption` | `string` | No       |               |         |

Copy

``` typescript
config {
  buildOption: @component
}
```

comments

| Property   | Type               | Required | Default Value | Details     |
|------------|--------------------|----------|---------------|-------------|
| `comments` | `multiline string` | No       |               | maxLen=4000 |

Copy

```` typescript
comments {
  comments: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
}
````

#### APEXlang Example

Copy

```` typescript
action "example" (
  position: value
  template: value
  label: label
  layout {
    sequence: 42
  }
  behavior {
    type: redirectThisApp
    target: value
    targetUrl: value
    linkAttributes: value
  }
  appearance {
    displayType: text
    icon: fa-check
    hot: false
    showAsDisabled: false
    cssClasses: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  }
  advanced {
    staticId: value
  }
  serverSideCondition {
    type: always
    sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
    language: sql
    sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
    plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
    plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    value: value
    item: value
    preference: value
    page: 42
    pages: [1, 2]
    text: text
    list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
    executeCondition: forEachRow
  }
  security {
    authorizationScheme: @component
  }
  config {
    buildOption: @component
  }
  comments {
    comments: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
  }
)
````

### `menu`

**Parent:** [`action`](#comp-8615)

#### APEXlang Example

Copy

```` typescript
menu "example" (
  type: menuEntry
  label: label
  parentMenu: @component
  layout {
    sequence: 42
  }
  behavior {
    type: redirectThisApp
    target: value
    targetUrl: value
    linkAttributes: value
  }
  appearance {
    icon: fa-check
  }
  serverSideCondition {
    type: always
    sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
    language: sql
    sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
    plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
    plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';

    value: value
    item: value
    preference: value
    page: 42
    pages: [1, 2]
    text: text
    list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
    executeCondition: forEachRow
  }
  advanced {
    staticId: value
  }
  security {
    authorizationScheme: @component
  }
  config {
    buildOption: @component
  }
  comments {
    comments: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
  }
)
````

### `triggerAction`

**Parent:** [`menu`](#comp-8715)

Applies when`menu.type = DEFINED_BY_DA_ACTION`

Copy

```` typescript
serverSideCondition {
  type: always
  sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
  language: sql
  sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
  plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
  javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  value: value
  item: value
  preference: value
  page: 42
  pages: [1, 2]
  text: text
  list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
}
````

#### APEXlang Example

Copy

```` typescript
triggerAction "example" (
  name: exampleName
  action: staticContent
  genAI {
    enabled: false
    agent: @component
    service: @component
    systemPrompt: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
    welcomeMessage: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
    itemsToSubmit: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  }
  affectedElements {
    selectionType: value
    region: @component
    button: @component
    items: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
    jquerySelector: "select * from table_name"
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  }
  execution {
    sequence: 42
    stopExecutionOnError: false
    waitForResult: false
  }
  clientSideCondition {
    type: "item=value"
    item: value
    value: value
    list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  }
  serverSideCondition {
    type: always
    sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
    language: sql
    sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
    plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
    plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    value: value
    item: value
    preference: value
    page: 42
    pages: [1, 2]
    text: text
    list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  }
  security {
    authorizationScheme: @component
  }
  config {
    buildOption: @component
  }
  advanced {
    staticId: value
    initJavaScriptFunction: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  }
  comments {
    comments: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
  }
)
````

Copy

```` typescript
serverSideCondition {
  type: always
  sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
  language: sql
  sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
  plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
  javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  value: value
  item: value
  preference: value
  page: 42
  pages: [1, 2]
  text: text
  list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
}
````

#### APEXlang Example

Copy

```` typescript
triggerAction "example" (
  name: exampleName
  action: staticContent
  genAI {
    enabled: false
    agent: @component
    service: @component
    systemPrompt: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
    welcomeMessage: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
    itemsToSubmit: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  }
  affectedElements {
    selectionType: value
    region: @component
    button: @component
    items: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
    jquerySelector: "select * from table_name"
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  }
  execution {
    sequence: 42
    stopExecutionOnError: false
    waitForResult: false
  }
  clientSideCondition {
    type: "item=value"
    item: value
    value: value
    list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  }
  serverSideCondition {
    type: always
    sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
    language: sql
    sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
    plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
    plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    value: value
    item: value
    preference: value
    page: 42
    pages: [1, 2]
    text: text
    list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  }
  security {
    authorizationScheme: @component
  }
  config {
    buildOption: @component
  }
  advanced {
    staticId: value
    initJavaScriptFunction: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  }
  comments {
    comments: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
  }
)
````

### `column`

**Parent:** [`region`](#comp-5110)

Applies when`region.type = classicReport`

**Direct Properties:**

| Property | Type | Required | Default Value | Details |
|----|----|----|----|----|
| `columnName` | `string` | Yes |  | maxLen=128 |
| `reportColumnQueryId` | `string` | No |  | maxLen=4 |
| `derivedColumn` | `string` | No |  | maxLen=4 |
| `type` | `enum` | Yes | `plainText` | enum=\[`plainText`, `plainTextBasedOnLov`, `richText`, `link`, `displayImage`, `downloadBlob`, `percentGraph`, `hidden`, `displayAsTextSavesState`, `datePickerClassic`, `datePicker`, `textField`, `textArea`, `selectList`, `radioGroup`, `hiddenField`, `popupLov`, `popupKeyLov`, `simpleCheckbox`, `rowSelector`\] |

**Property Groups:**

- heading
- lov
- layout
- accessibility
- appearance
- settings
- blobAttributes
- link
- element
- columnFormatting
- sorting
- exportPrinting
- advanced
- uiDefaultsReference
- serverSideCondition
- security
- config
- comments

<p>It is important that number format masks are only applied to columns that contain numbers and date format masks are only applied to columns that contain dates. Otherwise, a runtime error is raised when any record contains a value that can not be converted using the specified format mask.</p>

<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>column.type in (TEXT, TEXTAREA, DATE_POPUP, DATE_PICKER, POPUP, POPUPKEY)</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>height</code></td>
<td><code>number</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=22</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>column.type = TEXTAREA</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>viewFileAs</code></td>
<td><code>enum</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td><code>attachment</code></td>
<td>enum=[<code>attachment</code>, <code>inline</code>]</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>column.type = DOWNLOAD</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>template</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td><div class="help-text">
Choose the field template to be used when rendering the tabular form field. When no template is selected, the field is rendered using the default accessibility compliant label.
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>column.type in (DISPLAY_AND_SAVE, TEXT, TEXTAREA, DATE_POPUP, DATE_PICKER, HIDDEN_FIELD, SELECT_LIST, RADIOGROUP, POPUP, POPUPKEY, SIMPLE_CHECKBOX)</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>downloadText</code></td>
<td><code>string</code></td>
<td>No</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=255</td>
</tr>
<tr class="source-row">
<td colspan="5"><div class="source-component">
Applies when<code>column.type = DOWNLOAD</code>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Copy

``` typescript
appearance {
  formatMask: useAppDateFormat
  backgroundColor: value
  foregroundColor: value
  barWidth: 42
  width: 400
  height: 300
  viewFileAs: attachment
  template: @component
  downloadText: value
}
```

Copy

```` typescript
serverSideCondition {
  type: always
  sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
  language: sql
  sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
  plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
  javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  value: value
  item: value
  preference: value
  page: 42
  pages: [1, 2]
  text: text
  list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
}
````

  columnName: value

    primaryKeyColumn2: value

    ]

        value1
        value2
    ]

  sorting {

  }

    printWidth: unique-id
  }

        value1

  }

    ```

    text: text

    ]

### `column`

**Parent:** [`region`](#comp-5110)

Applies when`region.type = tabularForm`

**Direct Properties:**

| Property | Type | Required | Default Value | Details |
|----|----|----|----|----|
| `columnName` | `string` | Yes |  | maxLen=128 |
| `reportColumnQueryId` | `string` | No |  | maxLen=4 |
| `derivedColumn` | `string` | No |  | maxLen=4 |
| `type` | `enum` | Yes | `plainText` | enum=\[`rowSelector`, `plainText`, `plainTextSavesState`, `plainTextBasedOnLov`, `link`, `displayImage`, `downloadBlob`, `percentGraph`, `textField`, `textArea`, `selectList`, `popupLovShowsDisplaysValue`, `popupLovShowsReturnValue`, `radioGroup`, `simpleCheckbox`, `datePicker`, `datePickerClassic`, `hidden`, `hiddenSavesState`\] |

**Property Groups:**

- heading
- lov
- layout
- accessibility
- appearance
- blobAttributes
- link
- element
- columnFormatting
- default
- primaryKeySource
- sorting
- exportPrinting
- advanced
- uiDefaultsReference
- serverSideCondition
- security
- config
- comments

<p>Enter the format mask to apply to this column. You can type in the format mask or pick from the predefined list, based on a sample representation of how that format mask is displayed.</p>
<p>It is important that number format masks are only applied to columns that contain numbers and date format masks are only applied to columns that contain dates. Otherwise, a runtime error is raised when any record contains a value that can not be converted using the specified format mask.</p>

  backgroundColor: value
  foregroundColor: value

  height: 300

  template: @component
  downloadText: value
}
```

Copy

```` typescript
serverSideCondition {
  type: always
  sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
  language: sql
  sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
  plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
  javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  value: value
  item: value
  preference: value
  page: 42
  pages: [1, 2]
  text: text
  list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
}
````

### `column`

**Parent:** [`region`](#comp-5110)

Applies when`region.type supports COLUMNS`

**Direct Properties:**

| Property     | Type      | Required | Default Value | Details    |
|--------------|-----------|----------|---------------|------------|
| `columnName` | `string`  | Yes      |               | maxLen=128 |
| `show`       | `boolean` | Yes      | `true`        |            |

**Property Groups:**

- source
- heading
- layout
- appearance
- advanced
- serverSideCondition
- security
- config
- comments

}

Copy

```` typescript
serverSideCondition {
  type: always
  sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
  language: sql
  sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
  plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
  javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  value: value
  item: value
  preference: value
  page: 42
  pages: [1, 2]
  text: text
  list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
}
````

security {
  authorizationScheme: @component
  escapeSpecialChars: false
}
```

config

| Property      | Type     | Required | Default Value | Details |
|---------------|----------|----------|---------------|---------|
| `buildOption` | `string` | No       |               |         |

config {
  buildOption: @component
}
```

comments

| Property   | Type               | Required | Default Value | Details     |
|------------|--------------------|----------|---------------|-------------|
| `comments` | `multiline string` | No       |               | maxLen=4000 |

Copy

```` typescript
comments {
  comments: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
}
````

#### APEXlang Example

Copy

```` typescript
column "example" (
  columnName: value
  show: false
  source {
    dataType: value
  }
  heading {
    heading: value
    alignment: start
  }
  layout {
    sequence: 42
    columnAlignment: start
  }
  appearance {
    formatMask: value
    cssClasses: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  }
  advanced {
    customAttributes: value
  }
  serverSideCondition {
    type: always
    sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
    language: sql
    sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
    plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
    plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    value: value
    item: value
    preference: value
    page: 42
    pages: [1, 2]
    text: text
    list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  }
  security {
    authorizationScheme: @component
    escapeSpecialChars: false
  }
  config {
    buildOption: @component
  }
  comments {
    comments: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
  }
)
````

### `column`

**Parent:** [`region`](#comp-5110)

Applies when`region.type starts with TMPL_ and region.location is set`

**Direct Properties:**

| Property | Type     | Required | Default Value | Details    |
|----------|----------|----------|---------------|------------|
| `name`   | `string` | Yes      |               | maxLen=128 |

**Property Groups:**

- layout
- source
- lov
- accessibility
- appearance
- serverSideCondition
- security
- config
- comments

layout

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
<col style="width: 20%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Property</th>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Required</th>
<th>Default Value</th>
<th>Details</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>sequence</code></td>
<td><code>number</code></td>
<td>Yes</td>
<td></td>
<td>maxLen=22
<p>Enter the display sequence for this column. The sequence setting determines where this column is displayed in relation to other columns within the region.</p>
<p>Note: If two columns, within the same region, have the same sequence value then they may be displayed in a different order when the application is exported and imported into another environment, such as a test or production environment. To ensure consistency, Oracle recommends you specify unique sequence numbers for every item, or at least for those within the same region.</p>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Copy

``` typescript
layout {
  sequence: 42
}
```

<p>Enter the SQL query definition to populate this list of values. Generally list of value queries are of the form:</p>
<pre><code>select [displayValue],
       [returnValue]
  from ...
 where ...
 order by ...</code></pre>
<p>Each column selected must have a unique name or alias. Oracle recommends using an alias on any column that includes an SQL expression.</p>
<p>Note: When defining a Popup LOV item type, if you would like to display multiple columns in the popup, you must instead define your List of Values in Shared Components, with the required additional metadata. Inline list of values can only be used to display single columns for Popup LOVs.</p>
</div></td>

Copy

```` typescript
serverSideCondition {
  type: always
  sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
  language: sql
  sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
  plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
  javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
  plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
  value: value
  item: value
  preference: value
  page: 42
  pages: [1, 2]
  text: text
  list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
}
````

comments

    ```
}
````

#### APEXlang Example

Copy

```` typescript
column "example" (
  name: exampleName
  layout {
    sequence: 42
  }
  source {
    type: databaseColumn
    databaseColumn: value
    sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
    dataType: varchar2
    primaryKey: false
    availableOnClient: false
    valueProtected: false
  }
  lov {
    type: sharedComponent
    lov: @component
    sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
    staticValues: ```
    value
    ```
    language: plsql
    plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    displayExtraValues: false
  }
  accessibility {
    valueIdentifiesRow: false
  }
  appearance {
    formatMask: value
    group: false
  }
  serverSideCondition {
    type: always
    sqlQuery: ```
    select empno, ename, job, sal
      from emp
     where deptno = :P1_DEPTNO
    ```
    language: sql
    sqlExpression: ```
    upper(:P1_SEARCH)
    ```
    plsqlExpression: ```
    :CARD_LINK is not null
    ```
    javaScriptExpression: ```
    apex.message.alert( "Load complete." );
    ```
    plsqlFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    javaScriptFunctionBody: ```
    return 'Generated text';
    ```
    value: value
    item: value
    preference: value
    page: 42
    pages: [1, 2]
    text: text
    list: [
        value1
        value2
    ]
  }
  security {
    authorizationScheme: @component
  }
  config {
    buildOption: @component
  }
  comments {
    comments: ```
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
    ```
  }
)
````

### `column`

lov

<table>
